name: Amish Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugars, butter, oil, and eggs in a bowl. Beat well.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and mix until combined.
3. Refrigerate the dough for 2 hours to ensure it is well-chilled.
4. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
5. Roll the chilled dough into balls and dip them into granulated sugar.
6. Place the sugar-dipped cookies on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Flatten each cookie using the bottom of a glass, which has been dipped in sugar.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned around the edges.
